lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I was wondering if you could do something for me while I work to close the rift.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Tamara
lines.text: What is it? The rift will open soon and we should all be preparing to close it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I was wondering if you could close the barrier so that other adventurers don't interfere with us closing the rift.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Tamara
lines.text: Why would you want to do that? Wouldn't more help be appreciated?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I believe that we already have what it takes to close the rift and I wouldn't want any other adventurers getting in the way.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Tamara
lines.text: I'll close the barrier once the rift opens. If you change your mind before the rift opens I can revert this.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've changed my mind, we should allow other adventurers to join us in closing the rift.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Tamara
lines.text: I'll no longer close the barrier once the rift opens.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Tamara
lines.text: I'm not sure that would be a good idea right now.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Tamara
lines.text: The essence piles here contain lots of rift guardian parts.

lines.speaker: Apprentice Tamara
lines.text: Remember to combine guardian fragments with pure essence!

lines.speaker: Apprentice Tamara
lines.text: The cells here can be used to power up barriers and rift guardians!

lines.speaker: Apprentice Tamara
lines.text: Take uncharged cells with you to charge them at altars!

lines.speaker: Apprentice Tamara
lines.text: Don't forget that different cells produce different rift guardians!

lines.speaker: Apprentice Tamara
lines.text: Imbued essence can only be made at altars. Keep an eye out for the right altars to open!

lines.speaker: Apprentice Tamara
lines.text: I've opened a portal to the huge guardian fragment mine to the south east!

lines.speaker: Apprentice Tamara
lines.text: I've opened a portal to the huge guardian fragment mine to the south!

lines.speaker: Apprentice Tamara
lines.text: I've opened a portal to the huge guardian fragment mine to the east!

lines.speaker: Apprentice Tamara
lines.text: I've opened a portal to the huge guardian fragment mine to the south west!
